text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and Hishi Amazon and I are
out on our first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year will be quite the challenge for Hishi
Amazon. I wonder what she prayed for...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Finally, we're done! That line was way
longer than I thought it would be.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The same thing as always—good health for
everyone important to me!
choice_data_list: Oh, I wouldn't have guessed that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You seem surprised. Well, I can see why.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've got some big races coming up this year, and I
did think about prayin' for some good luck.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But it's not my style to ask for divine favor. If I'm
gonna win, it's gonna be with the efforts we put
toward victory together, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Such a confident answer is so true to her nature
that, without noticing, I break into a smile.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So, what should we do after this? We could dive
straight into some training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her suggestion isn't bad, but since it's New Year's
and everything, I feel it would be more
appropriate to celebrate.
choice_data_list: How about we get something to eat?
Do you want to try practicing some party tricks?
Let's make some traditional New Year's dishes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's a great idea! My stomach's just startin'
to get rumbly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We tour the stalls on the shrine grounds, sampling
what they have to offer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, that was great! Grilled squid tastes even
better when you eat it outside!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hold on, Teach! Your hands are all sticky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I must have gotten sauce on them while eating.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, you're hopeless. Here, use this wet wipe to
clean up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the rest of New Year's Day strolling
about at our leisure and have a nice, relaxing
time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that sounds like fun! I know of a cool
one—you know the one where you pull a
tablecloth off a table?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm always scared—I mean surprised—by Fuji's magic tricks, so I wanna do something cool too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's about time I leave her speechless for once!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the tablecloth is ready, and so are the
plates and glasses!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it looked like a cinch in that video I
watched. I'm gonna nail this in one go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raargh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Craaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the day, she continues practicing
the trick until she's satisfied with her progress.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice idea! It might take a while, but it'll be a
great chance to show off my skills!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's shop for ingredients!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now to take the bamboo mat off and... Nice, the
sweet rolled omelet came out just right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
How are the kelp rolls doing, Teach? We've been
simmering 'em for some time, so the broth should
have cooked off by now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Now it's really starting to smell like New
Year's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We work together to cook up a delicious spread
for New Year's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year is going to be a decisive one for us, and
I want to push through it at full throttle together
with Hishi Amazon.
